description: Emitted by T59 EventCreationOrchestrator after storeDocument(xiigen-events) succeeds. Triggers T60 EventRegistrationManager and T61 EventPromotionEngine.

tenantId.description: Tenant identifier from AsyncLocalStorage — never from request payload

capacity.description: null = unlimited. 0 = fully booked. Positive integer = capacity limit.

correlationId.description: Idempotency key for this event creation attempt

piiGuard: No organizer name, email, or personal data in payload. tenantId and eventId are opaque references.
arbiterRef: arb-flow03-event-store-before-emit: storeDocument BEFORE this event enqueued.
